title: [Abuse] Warning notice: “PKB Bank Finanzierung”
text: The Liechtenstein Financial Market Authority (FMA) informs that “PKB Bank Finanzierung” offers financial services in social media (Facebook) without a license or registration by the FMA und therefore is not listed in the official register of the FMA (www.register.fma-li.li).   “PKB Bank Finanzierung" unlawfully uses the name and logo of PKB Private Bank SA, a bank licensed in Switzerland.
